FIGMA_ACCESS_TOKEN.where: Figma → قائمة الحساب (أعلى يسار) → Settings → Security → Personal access tokens
steps: انقر قائمة الحساب في أعلى يسار متصفح الملفات
انتقل إلى قسم Personal access tokens
انسخ المفتاح فوراً — يُعرض مرة واحدة فقط

tokenScopes.desc: Read the current user's name, email, and profile image
Read comments • Create/modify/delete comments • Read contents and render images • Read metadata • Read version history
Read components and styles • Read published from files • Read published in team libraries
Read and list dev resources • Create and modify dev resources
Read and list webhooks • Create, modify, delete webhooks

FIGMA_ACCESS_TOKEN.selectedInAccount: Users, Design systems, Development, Projects, Webhooks
